name: @date-fns/example-cdn
description: Example of date-fns usage with CDN versions
author: Sasha Koss <koss@nocorp.me>

scripts.build: rm -rf node_modules/date-fns && mkdir -p node_modules && cp -r ../../dist node_modules/date-fns || pnpm run build-date-fns
scripts.test: pnpm run test-basic && pnpm run test-fp && pnpm run test-locale && pnpm run test-locales
